data.label: FluidSynth
data.description: FluidSynth 是一个开源的软件合成器（software synthesizer），它能够实时将 MIDI 数据转换为音频信号，广泛用于音乐制作、音频开发、嵌入式系统和教育等领域。其核心功能是通过 SoundFont 技术实现高质量的乐器音色合成。

data.label: FluidSynth
data.description: FluidSynth is an open-source software synthesizer that converts MIDI data into audio signals in real-time, widely used in music production, audio development, embedded systems, and education. Its core function is achieving high-quality instrument timbre synthesis using SoundFont technology.
